summary: Dialog = for-profit LLC (Stonebrick, LLC, owned by Auren Hoffman; Mamaroneck NY address), NOT a chartered society/nonprofit; single-investigative-outlet + public-records inference. Thiel co-founded (2006) but reportedly has 'no hand in running Dialog.' ED Raffi Grinberg runs day-to-day; staffer Juliette Levine. Two products: membership (1,000+) + retreats (2,500+ lifetime). Grades A/B/C CONFIRMED with counterintuitive ordering per WIRED: C=top tier (most famous, ~1 in 7), B=default majority (141/192 in leak), A='polite holding pen' for older established-but-less-notable members; grades revised after every retreat and drive pricing/seating/reinvitation. AI-generated dossier on every member/prospect stored in commercial Airtable (the leak vector). Off-the-record but NO NDAs — confidentiality is cultural/reputational, not contractual. Note: Dimension 6 flagged the C-is-top ordering as disputed across outlets; existence of a wealth/fame ranking is well documented, letter direction is contested.

elements.element: Legal entity — Stonebrick, LLC (for-profit), owned by Auren Hoffman; Mamaroneck NY; not a nonprofit
elements.description: Dialog operated through Stonebrick LLC housing Hoffman's business concerns; public records list Mamaroneck NY address, Hoffman founder/board. No 501(c) reported.
Founded 2006 by Peter Thiel & data-broker Auren Hoffman; Hoffman runs it as chairman while Thiel reportedly has no hand in day-to-day and is rarely present.
ED Raffi Grinberg runs ops with a small team incl. Juliette Levine; Hoffman chairman/co-founder. No formal board roster or full org chart published.
Invite-only community with paid membership (1,000+) and larger retreats (2,500+ attendees since founding).
C=top (most famous, ~1 in 7), B=default majority (141/192 in leak), A='holding pen' for older established but less-notable members. Revised after every retreat.
elements.grade: documented (leak, WIRED-verified) — direction disputed vs other outlets

elements.description: Lower-graded pay full price (>$10k) ~70% of the time; top-grade VIPs pay full only ~25% of the time, else discounts. Grade also sets dinner seating and reinvitation.

Staff + AI tools build a dossier on every member/prospect, stored in commercial Airtable; AI-assembled profiles confirmed for >=26 people; staff notes on ~50 dossiers. Exposed via misconfigured site directory.
Assets under management most-cited justification (e.g. '$30 billion in AUM'; another 'Small AUM').
1-4 score for value added to discussions, averaged across multiple staff.
Records who can be trusted to lead workshops, run 'Soapbox' sessions, or moderate.
Self-reported political leanings recorded and sometimes adjusted by staff away from the member's own stated view.

elements.element: Dossier field — fame/PII (Instagram, allergies, home address, DOB, emergency contacts)
elements.description: Home addresses, private phones, personal emails, DOB, photos, emergency contacts, food allergies, Instagram follower counts; internal algorithm asks whether 'the average person' would recognize someone (benchmarked vs Fortune 500 firm or 'top celebrity').

elements.element: Identity of the specific AI tool / who built it
elements.description: Attributed generically to 'Dialog staff and their artificial intelligence tools' and an internal 'algorithm'; no vendor/product/engineer named.
Strictly invitation-only; invitations non-transferable; lists continuously groomed.
Dropped for 'Value Add Too Low,' 'Poor Culture Fit,' or a slipped grade.
Non-attribution to encourage candor, but attendees reportedly NOT asked to sign NDAs; confidentiality rests on 'aura of exclusivity and mutual respect' — enforcement undocumented.
Retreats include workshops and 'Soapbox' sessions; moderation privileges assigned via dossier moderation-trust notes.
Situated within a wider Thiel machine alongside Hereticon, Teneo, Thiel Fellows, Founders Fund, Per Aspera — adjacent, not Dialog chapters.
Scheduled 12-16 Aug at Powerscourt Hotel outside Dublin; leaked registration list names 222 people (87 first-timers). Later cancelled.
